insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

The `delay` operator in .rs message files is NOT prefixed with `then` — it's just `delay 3 seconds`, not `then delay 3 seconds`. Using `then delay` causes an "Unrecognized operator" parse error that prevents the group from loading. Also, `delay` is a cooldown (minimum time between re-triggers), not a "wait X seconds before executing" timer.

Join message groups in join.rs don't require a `message:` line — a group with only conditions and `then warn`/`then command` operators will still be processed. This lets you use join.rs groups to send private messages (via `then warn`) to specific players on join without broadcasting a public join message. Add `message: none` if you also want the group to consume the Stop_On_First_Match slot.
